title: calligonum × dubianskyi
intro: Calligonum × dubianskyi, also known as the Dubinsky calligonum, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the buckthorn family (Rhamnaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Calligonum × dubianskyi include reducing inflammation and treating various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as supporting wound healing and skin care. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be administered internally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
